title: Hello, there
name: Mustofa Ghaleb Amami
role: Tech Lead Fullstack & Software Engineering Lecturer
hero-description: Leading technical innovation at Deriv, where I architect scalable solutions that serve millions globally. As a Software Engineering Lecturer at RevoU, I empower aspiring developers to master modern web technologies. Passionate about crafting elegant code that solves real-world challenges.

about.title: About Me
about.content: I'm a Tech Team Lead at Deriv, one of the world's leading fintech platforms, where I architect and deliver high-impact solutions that serve millions of users across 190+ countries. My technical leadership extends to the classroom at RevoU, where I mentor the next generation of software engineers, transforming beginners into confident, industry-ready professionals. With deep expertise in modern JavaScript ecosystems—React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js—I thrive at the intersection of technical excellence and user-centric design.
about.learning: Continuously expanding my technical horizons with Kotlin, Flutter, Swift, Go, and Python. In tech, staying curious isn't optional—it's essential.

what-i-do.title: What I Do
what-i-do.content: Leading fullstack development initiatives at Deriv—from implementing enterprise OAuth systems to designing seamless partner integration experiences. My work directly impacts millions of traders worldwide. Beyond corporate walls, I find my greatest fulfillment at RevoU, where I've trained 500+ aspiring engineers through intensive bootcamps, helping them land roles at top tech companies. My toolkit spans the modern web stack: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and cloud infrastructure.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.content: Kind words from colleagues who've been part of my journey.
testimonials.trusted: Honored to work with world-class engineers and leaders who inspire excellence every day.
testimonials.quote1: Mustofa is the rare engineer who excels at both technical depth and people leadership. His architectural decisions are sound, his code reviews are thorough, and his mentorship has elevated our entire team. He doesn't just build features—he builds systems that scale and teams that thrive.
testimonials.author1: Yashim Wong, Staff Engineer at Deriv
testimonials.quote2: Having Mustofa lead our fullstack initiatives has been transformational. He delivers results while maintaining exceptional code quality and team morale. His ability to break down complex technical concepts and empower others to execute is what sets him apart as a true technical leader.

clients.title: Clients
clients.content: Companies I've had the pleasure to work with.

cta.title: Ready to Build Something Exceptional?
cta.description: Whether you're building the next big fintech platform, need technical mentorship, or want to collaborate on innovative projects—let's connect. I'm always excited to work on challenging problems that make a real difference.
